title: lobelia berlandieri subsp. berlandieri
intro: Lobelia berlandieri subsp. berlandieri, also known as Blue Lobelia or Indian Tobacco, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lobelia genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia berlandieri subsp. berlandieri include its ability to act as a bronchodilator, reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and stress relief. Lobelia berlandieri subsp. berlandieri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
